title: Vybe
subtitle: Social Media Campaign
overview: This project involved the creation of a 9-grid visual strategy for Vybe, a social networking application designed to foster meaningful connections through shared interests and "energy." The campaign focuses on moving past superficial digital interactions by highlighting the platform's unique value proposition: matching based on "vibes" rather than just traditional profile metrics.
problem: Modern dating and social apps often reduce users to profile metrics and superficial swiping, leaving users tired of generic interactions and lacking meaningful connection.
solution: A bold, monochromatic purple palette to establish a strong brand association with creativity, mystery, and modern social tech. Crafted a series of relatable pain points (e.g., being tired of generic "Hey" messages) and positioned Vybe as the solution for more intentional communication. Combined lifestyle photography with stylized graphic masks and 3D UI elements to bridge the gap between human connection and digital interface. Clean, geometric sans-serif typography for high impact and readability.

features.title: 9-Grid Visual Strategy
features.description: A cohesive 9-grid Instagram layout that tells a sequential story about the problem and solution Vybe offers.

features.title: Bold Monochromatic Palette
features.description: Purple-centric visual identity establishing strong brand association with creativity, mystery, and modern social tech.

features.title: Narrative Design
features.description: Relatable pain points positioned against Vybe's solution for more intentional and meaningful communication.

features.title: Layered Imagery
features.description: Lifestyle photography combined with stylized graphic masks and 3D UI elements bridging human connection and digital interface.

results.description: Purple palette with layered imagery and 3D UI elements
